x-enumeration-literals.name: Customer Behavioral Insight
x-enumeration-literals.description: Understanding how customers interact with products, services, and brands.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Customer Demographic Insight
x-enumeration-literals.description: Analyzing customer characteristics such as age, gender, income, education, and location.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Customer Psychographic Insight
x-enumeration-literals.description: Exploring customers' lifestyles, values, interests, and attitudes.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Customer Transactional Insight
x-enumeration-literals.description: Examining purchase history, order frequency, average transaction value, and payment methods

x-enumeration-literals.name: Customer Feedback and Sentiment Insight
x-enumeration-literals.description: Gathering and analyzing customer feedback through surveys, reviews, social media, and customer support interactions

x-enumeration-literals.name: Customer Journey Insight
x-enumeration-literals.description: Mapping the entire customer journey from awareness to purchase and beyond

x-enumeration-literals.name: Customer Retention and Churn Insight
x-enumeration-literals.description: Understanding the factors that influence customer retention and attrition

x-enumeration-literals.name: Customer Financial Insight
x-enumeration-literals.description: Customer financial insights refer to the analysis and understanding of the financial aspects related to customer interactions and behaviors.
